question: Prairie View A&M Panthers vs. Florida Gators: O/U 152.5
description:
In the CBB game, scheduled for March 20 at 9:25 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if the Prairie View A&M Panthers and Florida Gators combine to score 153 or more points in this game.

If the combined total is less than 153, this market will resolve to "Under".

The result will be determined based on the final score including any overtime periods.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.
